offer: For construction project managers processing 5–15 projects/month, compliance reporting delays cause project penalties. We automate report preparation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in generating timely health and safety compliance reports.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction project managers
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to construction project managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing construction management tools
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation and dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
